preconditions.title: Unsupervised Multi-Step Decision Chain
preconditions.path: Senior Research Analyst → Financial Analyst → Trade Executor
preconditions.description: Delegation chain of 3 agents with no human checkpoint. Decisions cascade without human review.
preconditions.remediation: Add human_input=True (CrewAI) or interrupt_before (LangGraph) at critical points in the delegation chain.

preconditions.title: Irreversible Action Without Approval Gate
preconditions.description: smtplib is irreversible with no human approval gate.
preconditions.remediation: Add approval_required guardrail or human_input=True on the Task.

preconditions.title: No Timeout or Circuit Breaker on Agent Chain
preconditions.path: Senior Research Analyst → Financial Analyst → Trade Executor
preconditions.description: Chain of 3 agents with no timeout configuration. Chain can hang indefinitely.
preconditions.remediation: Set max_execution_time on each Task or step_timeout on agent nodes.

preconditions.title: Competing Resource Consumers Without Prioritization
preconditions.path: Trade Executor → Financial Analyst → Senior Research Analyst → Email (SMTP)
preconditions.description: 3 agents call Email (SMTP) with no shared rate coordination: Trade Executor, Financial Analyst, Senior Research Analyst.
preconditions.remediation: Implement shared rate limiting or token bucket across agents.

preconditions.title: Silent Error Propagation Across Agent Boundary
preconditions.description: Senior Research Analyst returns defaults on error (pattern: default_on_error) and feeds into Financial Analyst with no input validation. Error signal is permanently lost.
preconditions.remediation: Replace default-on-error with explicit error propagation. Return error types, not default values.

preconditions.title: Silent Error Propagation Across Agent Boundary
preconditions.description: Financial Analyst returns defaults on error (pattern: default_on_error) and feeds into Trade Executor with no input validation. Error signal is permanently lost.
preconditions.remediation: Replace default-on-error with explicit error propagation. Return error types, not default values.

preconditions.title: Confidence Laundering Through Agent Chain
preconditions.description: Chain of 2 agents via feeds_into with no confidence/uncertainty metadata preserved. Downstream decisions treat uncertain data as certain.
preconditions.remediation: Add confidence scores to agent outputs. Use structured output with confidence fields.

preconditions.title: Confidence Laundering Through Agent Chain
preconditions.path: Senior Research Analyst → Financial Analyst → Trade Executor
preconditions.description: Chain of 3 agents via feeds_into with no confidence/uncertainty metadata preserved. Downstream decisions treat uncertain data as certain.
preconditions.remediation: Add confidence scores to agent outputs. Use structured output with confidence fields.

preconditions.title: Confidence Laundering Through Agent Chain
preconditions.description: Chain of 2 agents via feeds_into with no confidence/uncertainty metadata preserved. Downstream decisions treat uncertain data as certain.
preconditions.remediation: Add confidence scores to agent outputs. Use structured output with confidence fields.

preconditions.title: Schema Mismatch on Data Flow
preconditions.path: Trade Executor → Financial Analyst → Senior Research Analyst
preconditions.description: 2 inter-agent data flows lack schema contracts: Senior Research Analyst → Financial Analyst, Financial Analyst → Trade Executor.
preconditions.remediation: Add output_pydantic or output_json on upstream agents. Use TypedDict State for LangGraph.

preconditions.title: Unvalidated External Data Ingestion
preconditions.description: External data flows through smtplib to agent without input validation.
preconditions.remediation: Add input validation on capabilities that ingest external data.

preconditions.title: Unvalidated External Data Ingestion
preconditions.path: Serper API → SerperDevTool → Senior Research Analyst
preconditions.description: External data flows through SerperDevTool to agent without input validation.
preconditions.remediation: Add input validation on capabilities that ingest external data.

preconditions.title: Implicit Authority Escalation Through Delegation
preconditions.description: Financial Analyst has 3 direct capabilities but can reach 5 through delegation. Escalated: FileReadTool, SerperDevTool.
preconditions.remediation: Implement capability scoping on delegation. Use tools= parameter on Task to limit delegate capabilities.

preconditions.title: Transitive Data Access Through Delegation
preconditions.description: Financial Analyst can reach 1 data stores via delegation that it has no direct access to: Crewai Tools.
preconditions.remediation: Review delegation scope and data access boundaries.

preconditions.title: Unbounded Autonomous Volume
preconditions.description: Senior Research Analyst has irreversible capabilities [smtplib] with no rate limiting or human checkpoint.
preconditions.remediation: Add rate_limited_by guardrail or human_input on the agent.

preconditions.title: Unbounded Autonomous Volume
preconditions.description: Financial Analyst has irreversible capabilities [smtplib] with no rate limiting or human checkpoint.
preconditions.remediation: Add rate_limited_by guardrail or human_input on the agent.

preconditions.title: Unbounded Autonomous Volume
preconditions.description: Trade Executor has irreversible capabilities [smtplib] with no rate limiting or human checkpoint.
preconditions.remediation: Add rate_limited_by guardrail or human_input on the agent.

preconditions.title: Regulatory Exposure Without Audit Trail
preconditions.description: smtplib has regulatory category 'communications' but agent Senior Research Analyst has no observability/audit trail.
preconditions.remediation: Add observability sink (LangSmith, OpenTelemetry) covering this agent.

preconditions.title: Regulatory Exposure Without Audit Trail
preconditions.description: SerperDevTool has regulatory category 'communications' but agent Senior Research Analyst has no observability/audit trail.
preconditions.remediation: Add observability sink (LangSmith, OpenTelemetry) covering this agent.

preconditions.title: No Rollback on Multi-Step Workflow
preconditions.path: Senior Research Analyst → Financial Analyst → Trade Executor
preconditions.description: Multi-step workflow of 3 agents includes irreversible actions with no compensating transaction or rollback mechanism.
preconditions.remediation: Implement saga pattern or checkpoint/restore for multi-step workflows.

preconditions.title: Concentration of External Dependencies
preconditions.path: Trade Executor → Financial Analyst → Senior Research Analyst → Email (SMTP)
preconditions.description: 3 agents depend on Email (SMTP) with no fallback. Dependent agents: Trade Executor, Financial Analyst, Senior Research Analyst.
preconditions.remediation: Add fallback mechanisms or circuit breakers for shared dependencies.

compositions.title: Unsupervised Chain With Silent Error Propagation
compositions.description: Unsupervised decision chain WITH silent error propagation through the same chain. The chain can make bad decisions AND no one sees the errors.

compositions.title: Unsupervised Chain With Implicit Authority Escalation
compositions.description: Unsupervised chain where agents exercise authority they weren't directly granted. Escalation without oversight.

compositions.title: Silent Errors Across Unvalidated Data Boundaries
compositions.description: Errors propagate silently across unvalidated data boundaries. No schema contracts AND no error visibility.

compositions.title: Unbounded Autonomous Execution of Irreversible Actions
compositions.description: Unbounded autonomous execution of irreversible actions. No rate limiting AND no approval gate on destructive capabilities.

structural_anomalies.title: Write-Only Data Store
structural_anomalies.description: PostgreSQL (write) has 4 writers but zero readers.

observation_points.description: Error boundary between 'Senior Research Analyst' and 'Financial Analyst'. Error signal is lost at this boundary (pattern: default_on_error).
observation_points.rationale: When an agent silently converts errors to defaults, downstream agents receive corrupted data that looks valid.
observation_points.suggested_implementation: Add error rate monitoring at this boundary. Log when default values are returned and alert on sustained error rates.

observation_points.description: Error boundary between 'Financial Analyst' and 'Trade Executor'. Error signal is lost at this boundary (pattern: default_on_error).
observation_points.rationale: When an agent silently converts errors to defaults, downstream agents receive corrupted data that looks valid.
observation_points.suggested_implementation: Add error rate monitoring at this boundary. Log when default values are returned and alert on sustained error rates.

observation_points.description: Agent 'Financial Analyst' has implicit authority over 1 capabilities not directly assigned: SerperDevTool.
observation_points.rationale: Transitive authority escalation should be monitored to detect when agents exercise capabilities beyond their direct scope.
observation_points.suggested_implementation: Log all delegation-chain invocations with the originating agent. Alert when escalated capabilities are actually exercised.

observation_points.description: Terminal agent 'Trade Executor' produces final output with no observation. Output quality is not monitored.
observation_points.rationale: Terminal agents in delegation chains produce the final output that reaches users or external systems.
observation_points.suggested_implementation: Add output logging with quality metrics. Consider adding a sampling-based evaluation loop.

observation_points.description: Agent 'Senior Research Analyst' sends to external service 'Email (SMTP)' with no rate monitoring.
observation_points.rationale: Outbound API calls should be monitored for unusual volume to detect runaway loops or data exfiltration.
observation_points.suggested_implementation: Add rate limiting and volume monitoring. Track calls/minute and alert on deviations from baseline.

observation_points.description: Agent 'Senior Research Analyst' sends to external service 'Serper API' with no rate monitoring.
observation_points.rationale: Outbound API calls should be monitored for unusual volume to detect runaway loops or data exfiltration.
observation_points.suggested_implementation: Add rate limiting and volume monitoring. Track calls/minute and alert on deviations from baseline.

observation_points.description: Agent 'Senior Research Analyst' sends to external service 'Email (SMTP)' with no rate monitoring.
observation_points.rationale: Outbound API calls should be monitored for unusual volume to detect runaway loops or data exfiltration.
observation_points.suggested_implementation: Add rate limiting and volume monitoring. Track calls/minute and alert on deviations from baseline.

observation_points.description: Data flow from 'Senior Research Analyst' to 'Financial Analyst' has no schema contract.
observation_points.rationale: Unvalidated inter-agent data flows can silently pass malformed data that causes downstream failures.
observation_points.suggested_implementation: Add output_pydantic on the upstream agent (CrewAI) or TypedDict State (LangGraph) to enforce schema contracts.

observation_points.description: Data flow from 'Financial Analyst' to 'Trade Executor' has no schema contract.
observation_points.rationale: Unvalidated inter-agent data flows can silently pass malformed data that causes downstream failures.
observation_points.suggested_implementation: Add output_pydantic on the upstream agent (CrewAI) or TypedDict State (LangGraph) to enforce schema contracts.
